title: Knowledge Index of Noah's Ark
purpose: Primary-source and release acquisition for queued review-kina-incentive-representativeness-validity; this record is not a deep review.

official_dataset.paper_linkage: The immutable v2 paper directly links this dataset; its README links the 2077AI/KINA repository and project homepage.
official_dataset.integrity_observation: KINA.json parsed as 899 rows with unique integer indices 0..898, ten A-J options per row, no empty required fields, and no exact duplicate questions. It contains 260 distinct discipline paths despite the paper/README claim of 261 fine-grained disciplines; this count is an acquisition observation for reviewer follow-up, not a validity conclusion.
official_dataset.release_boundary: The pinned dataset revision postdates immutable arXiv v2. Its 899 rows expose only index, discipline, question, options, and correct_answer at top level; the paper's claimed manuals, reviewer records/aggregates, elicited anchors, selection scores, candidate/rejection/revision ledger, payment/audit/appeal records, LLM-judge rubrics, raw model trials, and bootstrap inputs are not present in the acquired dataset revision. Option objects do contain answer explanations and source fields.

official_repository.paper_linkage: Linked by the paper-linked Hugging Face dataset README.
official_repository.release_boundary: The pinned 11-file repository contains an OpenAI-compatible inference runner, letter extraction/Pass@1 scoring, pretty-printing, and configuration but no committed dataset, manuals, rubrics, anchors, reviewer/tournament records, raw trials, paper result tables, bootstrap analysis, or repository-level license file.

additional_release_lead.authority_boundary: This personal repository was found during scouting and predates the 2077AI organization repository, but it is not directly linked by immutable v2. Preserve it as an acquisition lead, not as authoritative paper-time evidence.

project_site.status: The alternate homepage linked by the pinned dataset README returned a non-empty Next.js HTML shell. This acquisition did not treat mutable client-rendered leaderboard content as paper-time evidence.

verification.paper_extraction: Inspected the title/abstract and formal-claim framing, pipeline and release statements, appendix material, datasheet/distribution/maintenance sections, references, and final physical page. Layout extraction is continuous but figure-heavy taxonomy pages are visually scrambled in text; PDF/HTML remain authoritative for those figures.
verification.withdrawal_check: Immutable v2 API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
verification.claim_boundary: Full primary and release evidence acquired for a later deep review. No deep review, theorem audit, incentive-effect claim, representativeness claim, benchmark-validity claim, professional-capability claim, or readiness claim is made here.
